description_long: This is a compact, high-performance all-terrain vehicle with a striking blue and black color scheme and a streamlined, aerodynamic body. The vehicle features four large, knobby tires designed for maximum traction on rough surfaces, and a prominent rear wing for added stability at high speeds. The side panels are adorned with the phrase 'Butterfly in My Stomach' and a butterfly graphic, adding a unique and playful touch to its appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, and a thin antenna extends vertically from the rear, suggesting remote control capability. The chassis and suspension components are robust, with visible shock absorbers and reinforced wheel wells for off-road durability. The overall design is sporty and aggressive, suitable for both recreational and competitive urban or off-road environments.
description: A sporty blue and black all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, a rear wing, and a closed cockpit, featuring bold graphics and robust suspension.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide stance, large rear tires, rear wing, and the antenna extending upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'Butterfly in My Stomach' graphic, aerodynamic body, and the full profile of the tires and suspension.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the overall shape, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical layout of the wheels and body graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the vehicle's profile, graphics, and the structure of the front and rear tires.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby tread pattern with large, raised blocks for enhanced grip on loose or uneven terrain, making them suitable for off-road and all-terrain use.
